model.description: ID of the model to use (e.g., gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct)

prompt.description: The prompt(s) to generate completions for

suffix.description: The suffix that comes after a completion of inserted text

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

n.description: Number of completions to generate for each prompt

stream.description: Whether to stream back partial progress

logprobs.description: Include log probabilities on the most likely output tokens

echo.description: Echo back the prompt in addition to the completion

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating

presence_penalty.description: Penalize new tokens based on presence in text so far

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize new tokens based on frequency in text so far

best_of.description: Generates best_of completions and returns the best

logit_bias.description: Modify the likelihood of specified tokens appearing

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user
